title: Roving Tabindex Widget

statement.markdown:
# Roving Tabindex Widget

## Overview

Create a widget that allows users to navigate through a list of buttons using the TAB key. When the last button is focused, navigation should wrap around to the first button. When the first button is focused and the user presses the TAB key, navigation should wrap around to the last button.

### Requirements

1. The widget should have a list of 5 buttons.
2. Each button should be focusable using the TAB key.
3. Navigation should wrap around to the first button when the last button is focused and the user presses the TAB key.
4. Navigation should wrap around to the last button when the first button is focused and the user presses the SHIFT+TAB key.
5. Style the buttons using Tailwind CSS classes.
html: true
css: true
javascript: true

constraints: Only HTML, CSS, and JavaScript can be used.
No external libraries or frameworks can be used.
The widget should work in modern browsers.
